items.raw_desc: Teszter SIXTOL Mechanic Fluid Tester One Fékfolyadék teszter:The SIXTOL MECHANIC FLUID TESTER ONE is a compact and handy tool for quick and easy detection of the water content in brake fluid. Thanks to a pair of metal probes and five coloured LEDs, it allows an immediate assessment of the liquid level from 0% to more than 4% water. At the touch of a button, dip the probes into the tank and the result is immediately displayed on a clear indication. The tester is designed for standard DOT 3, DOT 4 and DOT 5.1 glycol fluids and is ideal for workshop, service and home use.
